problem_solved: Symptoms, visits, tests and questions are scattered instead of one unresolved concern.
v1_mapping: M22 Concern Tracker; M09 Graph; timeline
research_refs: Research F PI001/F001; SHM Health Thread; KFC001
data_needed: symptom episodes; dates; linked documents; results; referrals; user notes; thread status
safety_guardrail: Show why items are linked; allow unlink/correction; never infer diagnosis as final.

problem_solved: Patient concern, fear, timeline, and daily impact are lost in short visits or single-symptom forms.
research_refs: Research F PI002/PI007; Research C key findings; SHM M001
data_needed: own words; main concern; what changed; onset; severity; function; fear; own theory; caregiver view
safety_guardrail: Separate patient words from clinical facts; adaptive form; low-literacy and translation modes.

feature_name: Baseline change and function impact capture
problem_solved: Clinical records often miss 'what changed from normal for me'.
research_refs: Research F PI002; WellBe Context Is Everything; SHM Story Memory
data_needed: baseline statements; functional limits; prior ability; trend dates; optional wearable metrics
safety_guardrail: Avoid overinterpreting subjective change; label as patient-reported unless verified.

problem_solved: AI summaries lose trust when they cannot show sources.
v1_mapping: M16 Evidence Ranking; M26 Context Integrity; smart-indexing
research_refs: WellBe non-negotiable 2/3; SHM FEAT005; Research F safety principles
data_needed: source links; event IDs; timestamps; author/source type; confidence; evidence quality
safety_guardrail: Every generated claim must be source-linked or marked unknown/unsupported.

feature_name: Health Thread timeline and evidence graph
problem_solved: People cannot easily show the sequence of symptoms, tests, visits and changes.
research_refs: Research F PI001/PI009; Research A patterns; WellBe M09
data_needed: events; thread links; source refs; stage; confidence; evidence quality
safety_guardrail: Default to chronological fact display; separate inferred relationships from raw events.

problem_solved: Normal results are treated as closure while symptoms persist.
v1_mapping: M14 Missing Data; M16; Safety Engine
research_refs: Research F PI006; Research B normal-test trap; Research C patterns; KFC003
data_needed: test result; date; scope/body area; symptoms at time; current symptom status; follow-up plan
safety_guardrail: Use uncertainty language; explain limitations only generally; recommend clinician discussion, not diagnosis.

problem_solved: Users do not know what test is pending, when to expect it, or whom to contact.
research_refs: Research F PI004/PI016; SHM F010/F011; KFC004
data_needed: order date; test name; expected date; result status; source; user-designated contact; closure status
safety_guardrail: If owner/contact unknown, mark unknown; do not alarm without explanation path; urgent results use emergency-safe language.

problem_solved: Referral placed is confused with referral completed.
research_refs: Research F PI005; Research E high-confidence findings; KFC004
data_needed: request; specialty; clinical question; attachments; status; appointment; attendance; response; next action
safety_guardrail: Use clear status taxonomy: requested, sent, accepted, returned, scheduled, completed, advice-only, next owner unknown.

problem_solved: Uncertainty, pending tests, unresolved symptoms and return precautions disappear after the visit.
research_refs: Research F PI008/PI016; patient-flow post-encounter black zone; TSX blackzone
data_needed: visit summary; concerns; disposition; pending tests; follow-up instructions; safety net; user comprehension
safety_guardrail: User checklist does not alter clinical record; correction requests go into user memory/share packet.

problem_solved: Wrong, missing, or unaddressed concerns persist and compound.
research_refs: Research F PI007; SHM F005; OpenNotes/OurDX facts in SHM
data_needed: correction text; target event/summary; reason; status; share flag; audit trail
safety_guardrail: Corrections do not overwrite clinical facts; preserve as patient correction with provenance.

problem_solved: Clinicians need concise relevant history earlier, but cannot read a giant notebook.
research_refs: Research F PI009; Research D clinician needs; KFC005
data_needed: thread summary; patient words; timeline; results/referrals; unresolved items; source links; missing data
safety_guardrail: User chooses share scope; one-page default; source links; uncertainty label; no direct diagnosis claim.

problem_solved: Return visits are treated as isolated rather than one unresolved issue.
research_refs: Research F PI003; SHM FEAT007; Research B repeated visits ignored
data_needed: encounter dates; symptoms; dispositions; similarity score; worsening markers; current status
safety_guardrail: Frame as 'this has persisted' not 'doctor missed'; threshold meaningful repeat/worsening.

problem_solved: Family history, medication access, prior tests, out-of-system care and patient theory are often absent.
research_refs: Research F PI010/PI022; Research B patient self-advocacy; KFC002
data_needed: family history; medications; access barriers; prior tests; photos; external care; patient concerns
safety_guardrail: Sensitive fields optional and user-controlled; no blame language.

problem_solved: Out-of-system care, old records, photos, PDFs, SMS, and low-resource records do not travel.
research_refs: Research F PI018; Research E product implications; VISION.md
data_needed: file/photo/SMS; source type; date; issuer; OCR/extraction; user confirmation; quality confidence
safety_guardrail: Provenance and verification labels; do not overwrite official data; user consent for sharing.

problem_solved: Language, transport, cost, disability, trust and cultural safety barriers are omitted though they affect identification.
research_refs: Research F PI019/PI020/PI021/PI022; SHM M006; Research E key findings
data_needed: language; interpreter needs; transport; cost; digital access; caregiver; disability accommodations; cultural safety preferences
safety_guardrail: No ethnicity-based risk scoring; use to support access and communication only.

feature_name: Lab trend and personal baseline explorer
problem_solved: Slow changes and personal baselines get missed when values are reviewed one at a time.
research_refs: Research F PI015; WellBe baseline/anomaly principle
data_needed: labs; units/ranges; dates; baseline; symptoms; medication changes; source quality
safety_guardrail: Trend visualization only unless clinically validated; no disease inference from trend alone.

problem_solved: Medication interruption, affordability and access can explain deterioration or diagnostic confusion.
v1_mapping: M05 Medical; M08 Context; M13 Confounders
research_refs: Research F PI022; Research B medication/access-as-diagnostic-clue
data_needed: medication list; adherence barriers; cost/access; changes; side effects; timing
safety_guardrail: Nonjudgmental wording; privacy control; never recommend stopping/starting meds.

problem_solved: Copied-forward notes and unchanged summaries hide evolving symptoms or plan gaps.
research_refs: Research F PI023; Research D patterns
data_needed: notes; versions; extracted facts; timestamps; changed/unchanged fields
safety_guardrail: Highlight only meaningful deltas; do not accuse clinicians; user confirmation.

problem_solved: Patient/family concern about worsening can be hard to communicate and escalate.
research_refs: Research F PI012/PI025; Research C high-confidence findings
data_needed: thread status; symptom change; new red flags; user location/care options; prior plan
safety_guardrail: Use setting-appropriate urgent-care instructions; not real-time monitoring unless explicitly provided.

problem_solved: Open loops have no personal memory: who to call, by when, and what remains unresolved.
research_refs: Research F PI004/PI005/PI016; SHM M005; KFC004
data_needed: pending item; owner/contact; due date; backup; closure state; user reminders; source
safety_guardrail: Distinguish official clinical owner from user-entered contact; mark unknown where unknown.

problem_solved: Users research symptoms anyway, but need source-linked, non-diagnostic education tied to their thread.
research_refs: WellBe C9; SHM regulation/safety facts; Research F do-not-diagnose
data_needed: thread context; user question; external evidence; safety level; source quality
safety_guardrail: Outputs as questions/education; safety gate; no final diagnosis or medication advice.

problem_solved: Users test lifestyle theories but may make unsafe changes without structure.
research_refs: WellBe overview; Research F safety principles
data_needed: low-risk goal; baseline; tracking metric; exclusion conditions; stop criteria
safety_guardrail: Only low-risk behavior experiments; no medication/treatment changes without clinician.

problem_solved: Wearable and self-tracking data can overwhelm rather than clarify.
research_refs: SHM F012/R003/FEAT006; WellBe cross-everything correlation
data_needed: wearables; symptom logs; baselines; time windows; confounders; user labels
safety_guardrail: Show trends and baseline changes, not raw streams; note that data may not be monitored in real time.

problem_solved: The user needs to share the right context without handing over everything.
research_refs: VISION.md; Research F PI009; SHM Shared Health Memory
data_needed: share grant; selected thread; expiration; recipient; audit; export format
safety_guardrail: Revocable, time-limited, scoped; user preview before share; no institution-default access.

problem_solved: Clinician feedback can improve memory accuracy, but clinician workflow integration creates risk.
research_refs: SHM collaborative diagnosis; Research F clinician workflow support
data_needed: invite; role; comments; source verification; conflict resolution; audit
safety_guardrail: Optional and user-initiated; not EHR replacement; local governance required.

problem_solved: Low-resource and rural systems need offline, paper/SMS, referral-backup-aware workflows.
v1_mapping: M28; Telegram; mobile; patient-held record import
research_refs: Research F PI020/PI021; Research E product implications; SHM F017
data_needed: minimal thread summary; referral slips; CHW protocol; language; offline sync; stockout/referral availability
safety_guardrail: Scope-bound; supervision and referral backup required; do not assign responsibility without capacity.

problem_solved: Symptoms can be minimized due to age, gender, weight, mental-health label, race, language, or disability.
research_refs: Research F PI014; Research B mental-health misattribution; Research E cultural safety
data_needed: thread narrative; prior labels; red flags; dismissed concerns; clinician-reviewed language
safety_guardrail: Do not accuse; frame as 'make sure these factors are considered'; requires clinical and ethics review.

problem_solved: Clinicians need prioritized action, not more alerts.
research_refs: Research F PI024; Research D alert overload; SHM R002
data_needed: tasks; severity; owner; workload; false-positive metrics; override reasons
safety_guardrail: Not consumer MVP; needs local clinical safety case and workload testing.

problem_solved: Specialists see one slice and unresolved patterns across specialties are lost.
research_refs: Research F PI017; Research B no-one-connected-dots
data_needed: threads; specialties; referrals; clinical questions; source links; unresolved status
safety_guardrail: Use as summary/map, not automated referral or disease prediction.

problem_solved: What was considered, ruled out, uncertain, and what should trigger reassessment is not remembered.
v1_mapping: M17 Hypothesis Engine; M15 Contradiction; doctor-summary
research_refs: SHM M004; National Academies fact in SHM F003; Research F uncertainty principles
data_needed: assessment notes; user-entered plan; open questions; ruled-out status; reassessment criteria
safety_guardrail: Clinician-authored or patient-labeled; no autonomous ruling-out of conditions.

problem_solved: Users may need the right specialty/pathway after a referral gap or wrong specialty loop.
research_refs: Research F PI005; Research E system-type adaptation
data_needed: location; specialty; accepted conditions; insurance/access; language; wait times; thread summary
safety_guardrail: Rank sources transparently; do not imply a specialist is required or a diagnosis is likely.

problem_solved: Users may ask how their recovery compares to similar cases.
research_refs: VISION.md; SHM safety; Research F privacy/bias risks
data_needed: explicit opt-in; cohort criteria; privacy-preserving aggregation; bias metrics
safety_guardrail: User-initiated only; no default institutional access; no diagnosis/risk prediction; rigorous privacy review.
